title: Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia

{{Quote|Just last year, two shuttles carelessly spun into the Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia and were stranded without fuel while chasing the annual migration of mynocks to the wind turbines on the asteroid Akatoa.|Ebenn Q3 Baobab, ''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide''|<ref name="PhraseBook">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref>}}
The '''Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia''' were a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] located in the [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan sector]]. No more than a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] prior to [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] carrying a group of tourists became stranded without [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] in the Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia, an incident that the [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] noted in his [[Book/Legends|book]] the ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]''.

==Description==
The Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia were a [[Nebula/Legends|nebulosity]]<ref name="PhraseBook" /> located in the [[Tartaglia system/Legends|Tartaglia system]], a part of the [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan sector]]<ref name="EGTW" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Along with the rest of their [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia were linked via [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] to the [[Asamin system/Legends|Asamin system]] in the [[Strabin sector/Legends|Strabin sector]], the [[Nicandra system/Legends|Nicandra system]] in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Nicandra sector/Legends|same name]], and the [[Vectinia system/Legends|Vectinia system]] of the [[Hewett sector/Legends|Hewett sector]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==History==
{{Quote|This accident was attributed to the overzealous demands of picture-taking tourists on a novice pilot.|Ebenn Q3 Baobab, ''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide''|<ref name="PhraseBook">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref>}}
At some point no more than a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] prior to [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], two private [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] took a group of tourists on a chase after an annual migration of [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]],<ref name="PhraseBook" /> a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Diet/Legends|ergovorous]] creature that usually inhabited the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of outer [[Realspace/Legends|space]],<ref name="CSWE mynock">{{CSWECite|II|347|mynock}}</ref> to [[Wind turbine/Legends|wind turbine]]s located on the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Akatoa]]. Overenthusiastic demands from the tourists, who were taking pictures at the [[Time/Legends|time]], to the novice [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of one of the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] led both [[Starship/Legends|craft]] to carelessly spin into the Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia, where they were stranded without [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]]. The following year, the incident was noted by the [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] in that year's edition of his [[Book/Legends|book]], the ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]''.<ref name="PhraseBook" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia were mentioned in the [[2001]] book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], authored by [[Ben Burtt]].<ref name="PhraseBook" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tartaglia system, and therefore the Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia, in grid square M-7.<ref name="TEA" />
